ENERGY_EFFICIENCY_AND_GREEN_DETAIL.EnergyEfficientAndGreenDescription: The solar panels are leased and therefore not considered part of the real property. The lease is transferable when the subject is sold, however there is no measurable impact on value or marketability as the decision to transfer the lease would be the personal preference of any purchaser of the property.

INTERIOR_COMPONENT_DETAIL.ImprovementComponentConditionDescription: No damage or condition issues noted
No damage or condition issues noted
INTERIOR_COMPONENT_DETAIL.ImprovementComponentQualityDescription: Below grade area has a custom brick wet bar that includes wood countertops.
INTERIOR_COMPONENT_DETAIL.ImprovementComponentTypeAdditionalDescri: Wet bar with custom brick work.

PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL.UnitValuationCommentText: The 1st floor primary bedroom bath was gut renovated approximately 2-3 years ago with upgrades to the shower, addition of a large soaking tub, upgraded ceramic tile in the shower and floors, custom built vanity with marble countertop and upgraded fixtures and lighting. The kitchen cabinets were re-faced, and new solid surface countertops installed along with new appliances and lighting fixtures. The carpet was replaced throughout approximately 5-6 years ago with upgraded carpet on the first floor (including primary bedroom) and below grade family room. The 2nd floor carpeting was also replaced, however with standard grade carpet.

ROOM_DETAIL.RoomQualityDescription: Standard grade fixtures, floors, and cabinetry
Standard grade fixtures, floors, and cabinetry

FLOOR_COVERING.ImprovementComponentConditionDescription: No damage or condition issues noted.
FLOOR_COVERING.ImprovementComponentQualityDescription: Standard grade - meets market expectations for this type of unit.

FLOOR_COVERING.ImprovementComponentConditionDescription: No damage or condition issues noted.
FLOOR_COVERING.ImprovementComponentQualityDescription: Standard grade - meets market expectations for this type of unit.

INTERIOR_COMPONENT_DETAIL.ImprovementComponentConditionDescription: No damage or condition issues noted.
INTERIOR_COMPONENT_DETAIL.ImprovementComponentQualityDescription: Standard grade - meets market expectations for this type of unit.

PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL.UnitValuationCommentText: The ADU was built-out within the past 5 -10 years with standard builder grade materials that are typical for accessory units in this market. The unit has been well maintained with no apparent defects, damages or deficiencies.

ROOM_DETAIL.RoomConditionAdditionalDescription: No damage or condition issues noted.
ROOM_DETAIL.RoomQualityDescription: Standard builder grade cabinets, materials, and appliances

ROOM_DETAIL.RoomConditionAdditionalDescription: No damage or condition issues noted.
ROOM_DETAIL.RoomQualityDescription: Standard builder grade cabinets, materials, and appliances

STRUCTURE_COMPONENT_DETAIL.ImprovementComponentConditionDescription: No damage or condition issues noted.
STRUCTURE_COMPONENT_DETAIL.ImprovementComponentQualityDescription: Quality meets market expectations for this type of dwelling.

STRUCTURE_COMPONENT_DETAIL.ImprovementComponentConditionDescription: Foundation appears sound with typical hairline settlement cracks.
No apparent signs of damage or leaks.

STRUCTURE_COMPONENT_DETAIL.ImprovementComponentTypeAdditionalDescri: Thermal Double Hung and some Casement Windows

STRUCTURE_DETAIL.StructureValuationCommentText: The exterior was recently painted, and new windows, shutters, and doors were installed.

MARKET_DETAIL.MarketBoundariesDescription: Route 7 to the north, Route 611 to the east, and Route 50 to the south and west.
MARKET_DETAIL.MarketInventorySearchParameterDescriptio: Limiting factors of the market search include leasehold, a Lot Size between 7,500 and 21,780 square feet, with a property containing an ADU. Above Grade Finished area of the primary dwelling in the range of 1,800 and 4,500 square feet, with between 3-5 bedrooms and 2-4 bathrooms. Vehicle Storage greater than or equal to a 2-car garage.

PARCEL_SUMMARY_DETAIL.ParcelsLegalDescription: Unreal Farm S.1 PCL.300201121002432 F-895-4 BLA 3573702301420 Use agreement 71

PROPERTY_GROUND_RENT.PropertyGroundRentDescription: Leasehold properties are common in the subject's immediate market area with most leases having automatic renewal terms of 50 or 100 years. The lease fees are generally minimal in comparison to property values and appear to have no impact on the value or marketability of the properties. The appraisal utilizes 3 sales of comparable leasehold properties from the subject's neighborhood in the sales comparison approach.

SITE_INFLUENCE_DETAIL.SiteInfluenceDescription: Subject and all comparables are located in a residential area.

SITE_UTILITY_DETAIL.SiteUtilityDescription: Subject has solar power but has also maintained connection to public electrical lines.

SALES_COMPARISON_APPROACH_DETAIL.SalesComparisonCommentDescription: The subject and comparables are located within a suburban market area that is within 40 miles commuting distance to the Northern Virginia and Washington, DC metropolitan business and government centers. Sales of properties with accessory dwelling units, while not uncommon, can be difficult to identify as the units are often not advertised as separate living areas. Comparables #2 and #3 are given greatest consideration as they are the most proximate, contain accessory dwelling units and are most similar in age, quality, and condition to the subject. The subject and all comparables are located within the "Unreal Farms" neighborhood and are leasehold properties.

VALUATION_COMMENTARY.ValuationCommentText: Sales prices have been steady to slightly rising at approximately 1.5% to 2.5% annually. Supply and demand are currently balanced. Days on Market for the settled sales were predominately in the 80-100 days range. Days on Market of current listings is trending higher than recent sales due to the market entering the typically slower fall and winter periods. Absorption rate is 3-4 sales per month with a 4-5 month supply. The XYZ MLS indicated 10 of 34 (29.4%) of the closed sales in the market area between 09/15/2018 and 09/15/2019 contained seller concessions. Concessions ranged between $1,000 and $25,000, and the median concession was $7,100. This level of concessions was determined to have minimal impact on the marketability or sale prices for properties considered competitive to the subject.

The Energy Efficiency Ratings and Certifications for the subject and comparables have been considered in the reconciliation and final opinion of market value for the subject. The subject and comparable #2 have solar panels and had energy audits that provided efficiency ratings. Analysis of the data available indicates there is no measurable impact on market value. Analysis indicated that properties with energy efficient features and certifications have, on average, a lower number of days on market than properties with no energy efficiency noted.
Sales contract is a reasonable and a typical arm's length sale. A fully executed copy of the contract was provided by the lender and anlayzed by the appraiser.

Subject was listed on June 20th, 2019, with list price of $825,000. On July 31st, 2019, the price was reduced 3% to $799,900 and went under contract on 08/20/2019 for $765,000, which is approximately 7% below the original list price and within 5% of the final list price.
The exterior was recently painted, and new windows, shutters and doors were installed. However, the overall condition was reconciled to C4 given the interior condition of the primary dwelling.
Since the prior sale, the kitchen has been updated with new counter tops, new appliances, and new lighting fixtures. And the primary bathroom on the first floor was fully updated and upgraded.
Comp#1: Kitchen and Bathrooms have been upgraded and updated since the last sale.

VALUATION_RECONCILIATION_DETAIL.ValuationReconciliationSummaryCommentDes: Utilize this subsection for additional commentary as required by USPAP.
